## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.) — it becomes the release commit
- [ ] `ruff check .` / `black --check .` / `pytest` all pass locally
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` has a new entry under `## [Unreleased]` (if user-facing)
- [ ] Docs updated if public API changed (`docs/api-reference/...`)
